---
title: "References and Source Basis"
nocite: |
  @*
---

This page records the source basis used to seed the encyclopedia. The bibliography below is generated from `references.bib`.

## Background Documents

- `260501_offshore_hydrogen_model_description.docx`
- `260310_article_draft_A05.docx`
- `260205_article_draft_A03.docx`
- `260206 _article_draft_AJW.docx`
- `2060306 H1 H2 System Reassessment Rewritten.docx`
- `Manuscript_Ch1-Ch4_Export.docx`
- `Methodological positioning note.docx`

## Mentioned Source Types

- TenneT programme data for 2 GW offshore HVDC station cost assumptions
- NREL electrolyser cost basis, converted from 2020 USD to 2025 EUR and marked up to sales price
- Transition Accelerator compressor cost basis
- Manufacturer G stack polarisation curve
- Manufacturer H balance-of-plant power consumption data
- Supplier S pipeline cost data
- Installer benchmark for offshore infield cable installation
- TNO-related wind turbine and foundation cost assumptions
- Dutch Offshore Wind Atlas wind resource data

## To Do

Each component page should eventually link to a formal source entry with version, year, currency basis, confidentiality status, and model-use notes.

Entries marked `TODO` should be treated as source records that still need exact report titles, versions, URLs, access dates, or confidentiality notes before they are used as final evidence.

## Bibliography

::: {#refs}
:::
